nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: Hydrolyzed (Citrus Aurantium Amara /Forsythia Viridissima/Gardenia Florida) Fruit/Mentha Arvensis Leaf/(Angelica Acutiloba/Coptis Japonica/Glycyrrhiza Glabra /Paeonia Lactiflora/Platycodon Grandiflorus/Rehmannia Glutinosa/Scutellaria Baicalensis Root) Extract
chemicalDescription: Hydrolyzed (Citrus Aurantium Amara (Bitter Orange)/Forsythia Viridissima/Gardenia Florida) Fruit/Mentha Arvensis Leaf/(Angelica Acutiloba/Coptis Japonica/Glycyrrhiza Glabra (Licorice)/Paeonia Lactiflora/Platycodon Grandiflorus/Rehmannia Glutinosa/Scutellaria Baicalensis Root) Extract is the hydrolysate of an extract of the fruit of Citrus aurantium amara and Forsythia viridissima/Gardenia florida ; the leaves of Mentha arvensis ; and the roots of Angelica acutiloba , Coptis japonica , Glycyrrhiza glabra , Paeonia lactiflora , Platycodon grandiflorus , Rehmannia glutinosa , and Scutellaria baicalensis obtained by acid, enzyme or other method of hydrolysis.
inciName: HYDROLYZED (CITRUS AURANTIUM AMARA /FORSYTHIA VIRIDISSIMA/GARDENIA FLORIDA) FRUIT/MENTHA ARVENSIS LEAF/(ANGELICA ACUTILOBA/COPTIS JAPONICA/GLYCYRRHIZA GLABRA /PAEONIA LACTIFLORA/PLATYCODON GRANDIFLORUS/REHMANNIA GLUTINOSA/SCUTELLARIA BAICALENSIS ROOT) EXTRACT
inciUsaName: Hydrolyzed (Citrus Aurantium Amara (Bitter Orange)/Forsythia Viridissima/Gardenia Florida) Fruit/Mentha Arvensis Leaf/(Angelica Acutiloba/Coptis Japonica/Glycyrrhiza Glabra (Licorice)/Paeonia Lactiflora/Platycodon Grandiflorus/Rehmannia Glutinosa/Scutellaria Baicalensis Root) Extract
